creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to frf from comment #7)

As I understand, FreeBSD can be built on macOSX and at least some Linux varants.
If so, there must be a way to avoid using the macOSX or Linux /usr/include/
materials.

I've not looked into the details but there is:

https://wiki.freebsd.org/BuildingOnNonFreeBSD

that might give clues.
